title: Store paired data at add(1, primarySlot) to avoid a second keccak256 derivation
description: keccak256-derived slots are distributed across the full uint256 range. Adding small constants (1, 2, 3...) to a derived slot gives collision-free adjacent slots — the probability of collision with any other keccak256 slot is negligible. Used by solady to store the approved address at add(1, ownershipSlot) without any additional hash.
when_to_apply: When two pieces of data are always associated with the same key and accessed together
when_not_to_apply: When the adjacent slot might collide with sequential storage variables (slot 0, 1, 2...) — only safe for keccak256-derived primary slots
